title: leontodon hirtus var. humilis
intro: Leontodon hirtus var. humilis, also known as lesser hawk's beard or lesser dandelion, is a variety of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the kidneys. The health benefits of Leontodon hirtus var. humilis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb in herbal medicine. Leontodon hirtus var. humilis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
